calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Neil Fink Associated Inc., a dissolved California corporation by and through its Officer, Neil Fink, and Neil Fink, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408410-8040. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com.

Assly Sayyar, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Cadlerock Joint Venture, L.P., an Ohio limited partnership.
No appearance by defendants Neil Fink Associated Inc., a dissolved California corporation by and through its Officer, Neil Fink, or Neil Fink, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Unjust Enrichment and Promissory Estoppel was filed on September 25, 2018.
Substitute service on defendants Neil Fink Associated Inc., a dissolved California corporation by and through its Officer, Neil Fink, and Neil Fink, an individual, occurred on March 17, 2019 and was effectuated on April 4, 2019.
DOE & ROE defendants were dismissed on June 5, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 17, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Cadlerock Joint Venture, L.P., and against the defaulted defendants Neil Fink Associated Inc., a dissolved California corporation by and through its Officer, Neil Fink, and Neil Fink, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $36,835.04.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,445.20.
Attorney Fees - $3,325.00.
Costs - $653.00.
